name: Teriyaki Pork and Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Sweet potatoes, peeled, cut into 3/4-inch cubes (3 cups)
1 lb Boneless pork loin, cut into 3/4-inch cubes (3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine the sweet potatoes and 1/2 cup water. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low; cover and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender. Drain and remove the potatoes from the skillet; cover to keep warm.
2. Wipe the skillet with paper towels. Heat the oil in the same skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add the pork; cook and stir until browned.
3. Add the green beans or peas and teriyaki glaze; mix well. Reduce heat to medium; cover and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until the pork is no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the potatoes and orange peel; cook an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
